candidate_definition_hints.text: The dataset is used to train my own raccoon detector and I blogged about it on Medium

This is a dataset that I collected to train my own Raccoon detector with [TensorFlow's Object Detection API](https://github.com/tensorflow/models/tree/master/research/object_detection). Images are from Google and Pixabay. In total, there are 200 images (160 are used for training…
